title: Recubrimientos para pisos industriales para Ăˇreas de servicio automotriz
content:
Auto Service Areas
Automotive service areas require ultra-durable floors not only resistant to impact and heavy abrasion, but also chemical and stain resistance to common petrochemicals. Our flooring systems bring these benefits together along with increased slip resistance even when wet. Optional line striping and customization adds additional aesthetic appeal and branding.
Advantages
Resistant to damage from water, de-icing salt, and petrochemicals
Impact and abrasion resistant
Slip resistant in wet or dry conditions for pedestrian and vehicular safety
Quick install, minimal downtime
Suitable for high automobile traffic and other heavy machinery
Easy to maintain
Options for line striping, directional arrows and safety markings
For new construction and existing surfaces in need of repair and/or protection
Suitable for extreme hot and cold environments
Extreme temperature resistances including freeze/thaw conditions and extreme heat
Custom colors to match company colors, logos and branding themes
Service departments
Maintenance shops
Body shops and detailing centers
Garages
Warehouses
Paramount
Urethane Cement
